info.title: SKU.io — Connect to SKU.io
info.description: The entry point for any SKU.io task. Establish an authenticated connection: point at the correct tenant base URL, send a Personal Access Token as a Bearer token, verify it works with a cheap identity call, and inspect the token's scopes so you know what you are allowed to do. Use this first whenever you are about to call the SKU.io API.

get.summary: Return the authenticated user and account. Cheapest way to verify a token works.
List the account's Personal Access Tokens and the scopes granted to each.
